channel.title: Asbawy Blog
channel.description: Security cheatsheets, quick references, and field notes by Asbawy.

item.title: Active Directory Vulnerability & Misconfiguration Cheatsheet
item.description: A reference for AD attack paths — covering ACL abuse, Kerberos attacks, delegation abuse, domain dominance, GPO exploitation, and ADCS misconfigurations. Designed for Red Team engagements.
